name: Egocentric Bias in Vision-Language Models
summary: arXiv:2602.15892v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Visual perspective taking--inferring how the world appears from another's viewpoint--is foundational to social cognition. We introduce Flip...
description: arXiv:2602.15892v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Visual perspective taking--inferring how the world appears from another's viewpoint--is foundational to social cognition. We introduce FlipSet, a diagnostic benchmark for Level-2 visual perspective taking (L2 VPT) in vision-language models. The task requires simulating 180-degree rotations of 2D character strings from another agent's per...
author: Maijunxian Wang, Yijiang Li, Bingyang Wang, Tianwei Zhao, Ran Ji, Qingying Gao, Emmy Liu, Hokin Deng, Dezhi Luo
